description_long: This is a two-story brick house with a modern suburban design, featuring a prominent front entrance with a small porch, steps, and a white picket fence. The house includes a carport attached to the left side, sheltering two vehicles, and a well-maintained front garden with shrubs and flowering plants. The rear of the house opens to a private backyard with a wooden fence, a patio area, and outdoor seating surrounded by greenery and a palm tree. Large windows are distributed asymmetrically across the facade, providing ample natural light to the interior. The roof is primarily flat with some gable elements, and an additional structure at the back appears to serve as a garage or garden room. The exterior materials are mainly red brick, white trim, and dark roofing, with touches of metal and glass for doors and windows.
description: A modern two-story brick house with a carport, front garden, and a private backyard featuring a patio and outdoor seating. The design includes large windows, a flat and gable roof, and a white picket fence at the entrance.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the carport with two cars, the main entrance with steps and a picket fence, and landscaped front garden.
description_view_1: Direct front view highlighting the main entryway, symmetrical brick facade, and the full extent of the front garden and porch.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard with a patio, outdoor seating, palm tree, and the wooden fence enclosing the garden.
description_view_3: Back-left view showing the garage or garden room, side windows, and the transition from the carport to the backyard.
attribute_entryway_design: Central front door with small porch, steps, white picket fence, and landscaped garden
